message:
feat(cli): Add collection export functionality and offline prompt lookup

Collections Command Enhancements:
- Add --export flag to export entire collections to files
- Add --format option supporting 'skill' (SKILL.md) and 'md' (markdown) formats
- Add --stdout flag to output to console instead of files
- Implement buildPromptForExport() to construct Prompt objects from API payloads
  with proper field normalization (handles both snake_case and camelCase fields)
- Add extractPromptPayload() helper to safely extract prompt data from API responses
- Support exporting both free-tier and premium prompts from collections
- Generate proper SKILL.md files using @jeffreysprompts/core/export/skills
- Generate markdown documentation using @jeffreysprompts/core/export/markdown

Offline Library Enhancement:
- Add getOfflinePromptById() function to look up synced prompts by ID
- Enables collection export to work with offline-cached premium prompts

These changes enable premium users to export their curated prompt collections
as installable Claude Code skills or shareable markdown documentation, working
seamlessly with both online API access and offline cached libraries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
